posts.author: adavidoff (Amy Davidoff)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Can you set up a way so that the workspace admin can limit which templates show up in the drop-down list when creating a new project?

What are you trying to achieve

There are a ton of templates that show up in the prelist. Team members are picking the template at the top of the list instead of one of the 4 designated templates for our team (All start with GCI to make them easier to find in search). This means the new project asks for a lot of information that we don’t use or track, and the staffer has to redo the project in the correct template. The huge list of templates that don’t apply and the rework frustrate the admin and the team members.
